text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the end of January approaching, the hustle
and bustle of the new year has started to settle
down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf has asked me to meet her at the
dorms so we can hammer out a training plan.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry! I can't believe you sent a car all the
way to my house to pick me up...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It was no trouble at all. I'm simply glad to see you
back at school.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
With your debut on the horizon, please know that
the student council stands behind you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If there's anything you need, please don't hesitate
to call on us.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Thank you, President! That really means a lot!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That seems to be the last of them.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer. You're already here.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, indeed. That was the last arrival. Now the
student body is back up to its full complement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to believe that there are still students
filtering back in with January ending. I shake my
head in disbelief.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Often, there are several students who don't come
back at all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Just as they encounter the true cruelty and
intensity of racing, they return to the warm
embrace of their family. One can hardly blame
them for wanting to stay.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If that is what they truly desire, then I wish them
well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But if some piece of their heart remains on the
turf...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think someone should give them the
push to try again one more time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think about it, after our New Year's
shrine visit, there was a period of time when
Symboli Rudolf's phone line was always busy.
choice_data_list: Have you been calling them yourself?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should leave it to Air Groove and the
other student council members in the future.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I know that I can be... imposing. They would likely
be more sensitive.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But after seeing how exhausted Air Groove was at
the end of last year, I don't want to impose my
selfishness on her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, do I not seem selfish? And arrogant besides.
What else would you call an individual who
presumes to guide the entire student body?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What I'm doing now deviates significantly from
my official student council responsibilities.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So I won't ask anyone else to indulge me. Not
even you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, I believe we have some training plans to
iron out. We ought to—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buzz, buzz!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. That's my phone.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Would you mind if I take this? It could be urgent.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf speaking. How can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Air Groove did what?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President? Whatever is the matter?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? I heard you collapsed! Is
everything all right?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Not to worry. I've made certain my duties won't
be affected.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Brian has been coordinating the handover—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I meant. I'm asking about your
condition.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Work can wait. I can catch up on any deficit
afterward.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If there's been a handover, the doctor must have
ordered you to rest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What's your diagnosis?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Apparently I'm just overworked. I apologize.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What for?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm the one who owes you an apology.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's as plain as day that preventing overwork falls
on the president's shoulders. If I had managed our
personnel better, this never would have
happened. Forgive me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You shouldn't—no, no one should have to suffer for my shortcomings.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Such immaturity is... infuriating. Shameful.
Unforgivable.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But here and now, I swear that I will redouble my
dedication to the student council.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And I will start by taking on a portion of the work
that I've left to the rest of you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But, President... with all due respect, that will
interfere with your racing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've balanced both well enough so far. A little
extra weight won't tip the scales.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The Emperor's road is not an easy one, President.
Any additional burden—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What good is an Emperor who can't protect her
subjects?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You have your own dreams, do you not? Dreams
of finding glory as an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What would become of those dreams if you work
yourself to exhaustion? The work of the student
council can't take precedence.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll take care of everything myself. You focus on
resting and recovering.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Are we agreed?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...How dare you look down on me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Is that all we are to you? Dreams for you to
shepherd?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You tell me not to apologize. You say it's all your
fault.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Don't you see? You're treating us like children!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You've got it all wrong, President. You don't...
understand at all...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I am... We are...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Air Groove?! What's wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
What are you three doing?! Air Groove, you
should be resting!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to have disturbed you, Air Groove. I'll
come again some other time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the benefits of rest, Air Groove quickly
makes a full recovery and apologizes for her
outburst.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf apologizes in kind, and on the
face of it, everything seems to have been
resolved...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the incident casts a long shadow over Symboli
Rudolf's heart.
